Services

Clear, practical support for common technology problems. I keep the process simple and explain what I’m doing before making major changes.

PC

Slow Computer Help

Startup cleanup, updates, storage checks, browser extension review, basic security checks, and troubleshooting.

Wi

Wi‑Fi & Printer Support

Router troubleshooting, home office setup, printer setup, device connection issues, and basic network help.

Web

Simple Websites

Clean one-page websites for individuals and small businesses, including service lists, contact buttons, and mobile-friendly layouts.

App

App & Software Testing

Testing websites, apps, forms, workflows, and user experience to find problems before your customers do.

Sec

Password & Account Security

Password manager setup, two-factor authentication guidance, account cleanup, and plain-English security basics.

Bak

Backups & Device Setup

Help with phones, laptops, tablets, family photos, file backups, and basic home technology questions.

How It Works

No complicated process. You describe the issue, I tell you if it sounds like something I can help with, and we agree on a simple estimate.

1

Contact me

Call, text, or email with the problem and the device or service involved.

2

Get an estimate

I’ll let you know if it sounds like a quick fix, normal visit, or longer setup.

3

Troubleshoot

I’ll work carefully and explain important changes before making them.

4

Pay simply

Payment can be handled after work is complete. PayPal: Travislocaltech.

About Travis Local Tech

I started Travis Local Tech to provide straightforward help for people who need technology to work without getting buried in technical language.

Whether you need help with a slow computer, a printer that refuses to connect, a basic website, or simple account security, the goal is practical support that makes sense.

  • Plain-English explanations
  • No unnecessary upselling
  • Clear estimate before work begins
  • Helpful for homes, families, remote workers, and small businesses
  • Serving Alexandria, DC, Northern Virginia, and the DMV area
